---
title: "Initial Deepflora results"
format: html
editor: visual
---

## Accuracy Metrics

```{r}
library(tidyverse)

beeplants <- readRDS("data/beeplants.rds")

overall <- read.csv("results/accuracy_metrics/initial_db_overall_results_band-1.csv")
perobs <- read.csv("results/accuracy_metrics/initial_db_per_observations_results_band-1.csv")
persp <- read.csv("results/accuracy_metrics/initial_db_per_species_results_band-1.csv")

persp.metrics <- persp$metric

persp.l <- persp |> dplyr::select(-dset_name,-model,-loss,-exp_id,-pretrained,-metric,-date, -batch_size,-epoch,-thres,-band) |>
  t() |> as.data.frame() |> setNames(persp.metrics) |>
  rownames_to_column("scientificName") |> 
  mutate(scientificName = gsub("\\."," ",scientificName)) %>%
  separate_wider_delim(scientificName, delim=" ",
                       names=c("genus","sp"),
                       too_few = "align_start",
                       too_many = "merge",
                       cols_remove = FALSE)

# all bee floral resource sp (Grozinger + Fowler)
persp.fr <- persp.l %>%
  filter(genus %in% beeplants$genus$genus |
           scientificName %in% beeplants$species$scientificName)

# all PA bee floral resource sp (Grozinger list)
persp.fr.g <- persp.l %>%
  filter(genus %in% beeplants$genus$genus |
           scientificName %in% (beeplants$species %>% 
                                  dplyr::filter(source == "Grozinger") %>% 
                                  pull(scientificName)))

# 50+ support subset
persp.fr.g50 <- persp.fr.g %>% arrange(support) %>% top_n(50)

```
